name: AWS S3 Object Copied with SSE-KMS Encryption
description: An S3 object was copied using AWS Key Management Service (SSE-KMS) encryption, which provides additional security through access-controlled encryption keys. While this method ensures secure storage, an attacker with sufficient privileges could use it to exfiltrate or re-encrypt stolen data. It is essential to review the source, destination, and initiator of this action to confirm its legitimacy.

rules.name: AWS S3 Object Copied with SSE-KMS Encryption

author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
